title: Sea of Treasure
description: A roleplaying datapack that adds treasure items from Sea of Thieves
body:
![Sea of Treasure Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2caef1b02ba8992f8551b61f5dc1b49ceece8e52.jpeg)

## About
Sea of Treasure is a mainly roleplaying/decorative datapack that adds treasure, skulls, trinkets and other items from Sea of Thieves. You can collect, wear, display and use these items from the pirate game

## Config
To toggle certain optional features, type /function sot:_config into the chat

## Features
- **Treasure Hunting**: Explore the world and find treasure in chests, dig them up from suspicious blocks, barter and kill mobs.
- **Ambient Treasure**: Some items will come with passive effects like slowing down players, displaying beacons that go up high into the sky, and the Chest of a Thousand Grogs giving you nausea. (This can be configured to turn it on/off)
- **Functional Treasure**: Some treasure can be used as weapons when right clicked. Kegs can be detonated and will even cause chain reactions between one another, traps can be thrown to catch unwanted visitors, blunderbombs and other throwables can be thrown to cause mayhem, and some skulls will spew flames and curses.


<details>
<summary>Treasure locations</summary>

- Archeology:
  - **Desert Well**: Villainous Skull | Crown of Hope
  - **Trail Ruins**: Ritual Skull 
  - **Desert Temple**: Villainous Skull
  - **Ocean Ruins**: Wrathful King's Skull | Siren Gems | Trident of Dark Tides


- Chests:
  - **Ancient City**: Skull of Ancient Fortune | Jar of Athena's Incense | Chest of Legends
  - **Bastion**: Reaper's Bounty | Dark Skull | Obsidian Ashen Winds Skull
  - **Buried Treasure**: Chest of a Thousand Grogs | Mermaid Gems | Horn of Fair Winds | Chest of Siren Song
  - **Desert Temple**: Foul Skull | Mermaid Gems | Stronghold Chest | Chest of Ancient Tributes
  - **End City**: Villainous Skull of Ancient Fortune | Chalice of Ancient Fortune | Keg of Ancient Blackpowder | Chest of Fortune
  - **Jungle Temple**: Foul Skull | Mermaid Gems | Stronghold Chest | Chest of Ancient Tributes
  - **Shipwreck**: Foul Skull | Mermaid Gems | Captain's Chest | Wrathful King's Skull | King's Chest
  - **Dungeon**: Mermaid Gems
  - **Stronghold**: Captain's Chest | Stronghold Chest | Stronghold Skull | Stronghold Gunpowder Barrel
  - **Ocean Ruins**: Siren Gems | Foul Skull | Shipwrecked Chest | King's Chest
  - **Phantom Garrison**: Old Skull | Foul Skull


- Mobs
  - **Elder Guardian**: Breaths of the Sea


- Other:
  - **Piglin Bartering**: Generous Gift | Humble Gift
  - **Fishing**: Old Skull | Fish Bones | Irresistible Bait Pack | Elegant Fishing Float Pack | Finest Fish Hook Pack | Hunting Spear Tip Pack | Crate of Curious Fish Scales | Crate of Shark's Teeth | Crate of Precious Pearls | Crate of Kraken Tentacles | Horn of Fair Winds
  - **Phantom Garrison Vault**: Artifact of Legendary Hunger | Athena's Relic | Crate of Legendary Voyages | Gilded Relic of Ancient Fortune | Offering of Legendary Goods | Legendary Fortune Keeper | Chest of Legends | Skull of Athena's Blessing | Chalice of Ancient Fortune | Jar of Athena's Incense


</details>
